title: mirabilis californica var. glutinosa
intro: Mirabilis californica var. glutinosa, commonly known as California Globe Mallow, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. California Globe Mallow can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
